reviews.review_description: You can't eat the candy though and have to run really fast to get it.
It's short. Also there is no random players online. I wish single player mode was little better. Also hitting a pinata alone is kind of annoying because need to hit many times to start a game.

I enjoyed playing this game, it really pumps you up..makes you feel like a kid again. I only had one issue..why isn't it available to play from the oculus rooms menu? It's a multiplayer game and oculus rooms lists your  multiplayer games from your library to play with friends..sadly that one isn't amongst the list..

developer_response.body: Great suggestion! Integrating Rooms is definitely a priority. We're working on it.
